original_image_tags: Red rectangular stamp: MAILED 21 / FEB 23 1972 / FBI
Handwritten notes in bottom right corner, possibly "File" and initials "mbr"
Small handwritten initials/signature near bottom right, possibly "Jr" or "Jr. File"

elements.description: Typed letter dated February 23, 1972, addressed to Miss Mary Beth Martine. The body text states that UFO investigations are not within the FBI's jurisdiction. It includes handwritten annotations, a 'MAILED 21 FEB 23 1972 FBI' stamp, a date stamp '60 MAR 2 1972', and handwritten notes including 'Pvt' and '937'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content of stamps and handwritten annotations, but Description B omits the handwritten 'File' and 'Jr'/'Jr. File' notes while also adding 'Pvt' which is not mentioned in Description A.
